title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that chains Claude Opus for planning and integration logic with Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design and frontend implementation. The approach leverages each model's strengths: Opus for reasoning and copy, Gemini for visual design quality. The workflow is implemented using Archon, an automation tool.
